get.description:
Official content definitions: staff-authored (or owner-less) adventures,
challenges, and lessons. Create/edit happens in the existing level editor.
Shared player-generated content: public published content definitions.

post.description: Upsert + toggle a feature flag by key.

Run a staff action on a user: grant/deduct coins, toggle staff or
active. One action per call via the ``action`` field.

get.description: Published command forms an author can attach to a level (introduce/reuse).
Traffic-readiness probe for database and shared-cache reachability.
Process-only probe. Dependency outages must not restart healthy workers.

post.description:
Unauthenticated by design - Stripe calls this directly. Authenticity
comes from the signed payload, not a session/JWT.

get.description:
OpenApi3 schema for this API. Format can be selected via content negotiation.

- JSON: application/vnd.oai.openapi+json
